enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thara Local'?

'Thara Local' celebrates the local culture and the carefree spirit of youth, embodying a fun and energetic vibe.

How does this song fit into the plot of the movie 'Maari'?

The song showcases the protagonist's lively personality and sets the tone for his adventures in the film.

Who is the music director of 'Thara Local'?

The music for 'Thara Local' is composed by the talented Anirudh Ravichander.

When was 'Thara Local' released?

'Thara Local' was released on June 7, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Thara Local', the song encapsulates the vibrant and carefree spirit of the protagonist, Maari. The upbeat tempo and energetic beats create an atmosphere of celebration and joy, making it a perfect dance number. It conveys a sense of pride in local culture and the joy of living life to the fullest. The lively lyrics and catchy rhythm evoke feelings of happiness and excitement, making it a favorite among party-goers.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thara Local from Maari is a vibrant anthem that captures the essence of youthful exuberance and local charm. With Anirudh's infectious beats and Dhanush's charismatic delivery, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the lively spirit of Maari as it brings a unique blend of energy and fun to your playlist!
stanzaMeanings: This person is famous and new. He has a strong heart.
Hey everyone, there is no trouble, no issues, nothing wrong, nothing bad.
There is no distance to see, no sadness, no problems, no sadness, no issues.
Maari... a little good Maari, very different Maari, Maari... talkative Maari, roaring lion Maari.
The world doesn't know about justice, righteousness is absent, love cannot be understood.
No, we don't want that, our party is unique here. Don't look, he is a player who wins everything.
Maari... a little good Maari, very different Maari, Maari... talkative Maari, roaring lion Maari.
This person is famous and new. He has a strong heart.
Hey everyone, there is no trouble, no issues, nothing wrong, nothing bad.
There is no distance to see, no sadness, no problems, no sadness, no issues.
